title: Add Top Vibing Songs – Backend Data Model & Admin Form

requirements.text: Add a `TopVibingSong` type to the backend with fields: id (Nat), title (Text), artistName (Text), genre (Text), artworkUrl (Text), streamingLink (Text), tagline (opt Text), rank (Nat). Store a stable list of TopVibingSong entries in the main actor. Expose the following update/query functions: `addTopVibingSong`, `updateTopVibingSong`, `deleteTopVibingSong`, `reorderTopVibingSongs` (accepts full ordered list of IDs), and `getTopVibingSongs` (returns list sorted by rank ascending).
acceptanceCriteria: TopVibingSong type is defined with all required fields
addTopVibingSong stores a new entry and assigns an auto-incremented id
deleteTopVibingSong removes the entry with the given id
reorderTopVibingSongs accepts an ordered array of IDs and updates ranks accordingly
getTopVibingSongs returns all entries sorted by rank ascending

requirements.text: Add artwork upload support for Top Vibing Songs. When an admin submits the form, upload the artwork image as an ExternalBlob via the existing file upload utility (`fileToExternalBlob`), store the blob in the backend, and persist the resulting URL/reference in the `artworkUrl` field of the TopVibingSong entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin form artwork field is required — form cannot be submitted without it
Artwork is uploaded before the song entry is saved
Saved TopVibingSong entry contains a valid artworkUrl referencing the uploaded file

requirements.text: Add a 'Top Vibing Songs' management section to the Admin Dashboard. The section must include: (1) A form to add a new entry with fields — Song Title (text, required), Artist Name (text, required), Genre (text, required), Artwork Upload (required), Streaming Link (URL, required), Tagline (text, optional); (2) A list of all current Top Vibing Songs displayed as draggable cards that can be reordered via drag-and-drop to set rank order; (3) Edit and Delete actions per entry. Use `dnd-kit` or equivalent supported drag-and-drop approach consistent with the codebase.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin form renders all required fields with correct validation
Submitting the form calls addTopVibingSong and refreshes the list
Cards in the list can be dragged to reorder; on drop, reorderTopVibingSongs is called
Delete button calls deleteTopVibingSong and removes the card from the list
Edit action opens the form pre-populated with existing values and calls updateTopVibingSong on save
New 'Top Vibing Songs' tab or section is visible in the Admin Dashboard

requirements.text: Display a 'Top Vibing Songs' section on the public Landing Page. Fetch entries via `getTopVibingSongs` and render them ordered by rank. Each card should show: artwork image, song title, artist name, genre, tagline (if present), and a 'Listen Now' button that opens the streaming link in a new tab. Style consistently with the existing MostVibingArtistsCarousel aesthetic.
acceptanceCriteria: Top Vibing Songs section appears on the Landing Page below the featured artists carousel
Songs are displayed in rank order (rank 1 first)
Each card shows artwork, title, artist name, genre, and tagline when present
Listen Now button opens the streaming link in a new browser tab
Section is hidden or shows an empty state when no songs have been added

requirements.text: Display the same 'Top Vibing Songs' section inside the User Dashboard. Reuse the same ranked card layout as the Landing Page. Place it as a distinct tab or section within the User Dashboard so authenticated users can browse the curated vibing songs.
acceptanceCriteria: Top Vibing Songs section is accessible from the User Dashboard
Displays the same data and rank order as the Landing Page section
Listen Now button opens the streaming link in a new tab
Section renders without errors when the song list is empty

constraints: All backend logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo)
Artwork must be uploaded using the existing ExternalBlob / fileToExternalBlob pattern — do not introduce a new upload mechanism
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Linking Top Vibing Songs entries to existing platform song submissions
User-facing voting or popularity scoring for song ranking
Limiting the number of Top Vibing Songs entries
Displaying Top Vibing Songs in any page other than the Landing Page and User Dashboard
